tool_input.prompt:
ETRNL task packet
Goal: implement task T1.
Context summary: approved plan exists.
Exact scope: scripts only.
Cwd/project context: /repo.
Read set: scripts and tests.
Write scope: scripts/example.mjs.
Forbidden files: package manifests.
Expected output: changed files and verification.
Verification command: pnpm test.
Model tier: sonnet.
Timeout: 20 minutes.
Retry policy: retry once after diagnosis.
Do not revert user changes or others' work.
WebSearch guidance: no WebSearch unless official docs are required.
